final_message:
All 6 tests pass. Two bugs fixed in `lrucache/cache.py`:

1. **`get` didn't refresh recency** — added `self._data.move_to_end(key)` on a successful (non-expired) lookup, so reads count as "use" per the docstring.
2. **`put` evicted unconditionally at capacity** — updating an existing key evicted another entry even though the size doesn't grow. Now eviction only happens when the key is new and the cache is full.

Root causes are documented in `SOLUTION.md`.
